As per earlier orders, all personnel currently serving in the
Foundation must expel fluids / urinate / do their business
exclusively into the correctly colored and labeled vials provided by

the Foundation and demonstrates a profound disrespect not only

If I discover firsthand any agents treating the oblivion as their
personal lavatory, they will be forced to go down there and
personally clean up their mess.
Signed,
Director Broderick Northmoor
